mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart ( c_code, id, f_code, f_status, f_count, f_addr, f_name, f_tel, f_price, f_point ) VALUES ( #{c_code}, #{id}, #{f_code}, #{f_status}, #{f_count}, #{f_addr}, #{f_name}, #{f_tel}, #{f_price}, #{f_point} )
mapper.select: SELECT c_code, id, f_code, f_status, f_dstatus, f_count, f_addr, f_name, f_tel, f_price, f_point, cart_statusdate FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND f_status = 'N' ORDER BY c_code DESC
SELECT c_code, id, f_code, f_status, f_dstatus, f_count, f_addr, f_name, f_tel, f_price, f_point FROM cart WHERE c_code = #{c_code}
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET f_count = #{f_count}, f_addr = #{f_addr}, f_name = #{f_name}, f_tel = #{f_tel}, f_price = #{f_price}, f_point = #{f_point}, f_status = #{f_status}, f_dstatus = #{f_dstatus} WHERE c_code = #{c_code}
mapper.select: SELECT c_code, id, f_code, f_status, f_dstatus, f_count, f_addr, f_name, f_tel, f_price, f_point FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND f_code = #{f_code} AND f_status = 'N'
SELECT c_code, id, f_code, f_status, f_dstatus, f_count, f_addr, f_name, f_tel, f_price, f_point, cart_statusdate FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND f_status = 'Y' ORDER BY c_code DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET f_status = 'N', f_dstatus = null WHERE c_code = #{c_code} AND id = #{id} AND f_status = 'Y' AND f_dstatus IN (0, 1)
